violations.text: Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands after returning from outside. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (fruit) in the display refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Paper cups were observed in direct contact with the food below in the prep unit. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The faucet of the 3-bay sink is an insufficient length to fill all 3 basins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The refuse area has an accumulation of leaf litter. Refuse areas must be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
Juicer was observed in poor repair with two cracks and tape adhered to spout. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of sanitizing dishes at the 3 bay sink. The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. 3 bay sink was set up during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State guidance was provided to establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Dishes were observed in the hand-washing sink. Handwashing sink was also observed used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Milk, oatmilk, soymilk, almondmilk was observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was moved to other refrigeration, oatmilk, soymilk, and almondmilk was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Unit was adjusted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
Juicer was observed in poor repair with two cracks and tape adhered to spout. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
3 door lowboy refrigerator was observed at an ambient of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
Faucet insufficient length to adequately fill all 3 basins of 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2023
